# Yarova

> An IT placement consultancy for the AI era. We get people into DevOps, SRE, and Platform Engineering roles in Canada.

Yarova is a placement consultancy — not a bootcamp, not a course platform.

The program builds real GitHub artifacts: 33 executed tickets across 8 phases, 3 repositories (viro-services, viro-tooling, viro-infra), and a resume rebuilt around proof.

Founder: Rohith Yadla — Solutions Architect with 10 years of production consulting experience across Morgan Stanley, Salesforce, and the BC Government.

## What Yarova does

- Structured 8-phase program — foundations through interview readiness
- 33 tickets executed and committed to GitHub by the participant
- Live group sessions, async coaching, mock interviews, resume rebuild
- Support until the participant has an offer — no time cap
- One-time $1,500 CAD — rejoin free if program is completed without landing a role

## Who it is for

- People already in Canada who need a structured path to DevOps/SRE interviews
- Newcomers arriving within 6–12 months or on shrinking PGWP authorization
- Career switchers targeting DevOps or SRE specifically
- IT professionals (junior, sysadmin, QA) going senior

## Roles targeted

- DevOps Engineer (Junior–Mid): $75,000–$110,000 CAD
- Site Reliability Engineer I–II: $90,000–$130,000 CAD
- Site Reliability Engineer III / Senior: $130,000–$170,000 CAD
- Platform Engineer: $110,000–$155,000 CAD
- Cloud Engineer / Cloud Architect Assoc.: $95,000–$140,000 CAD

- Discovery call: https://cal.com/yarova-fxqeea/discovery-call
- WhatsApp Business: https://wa.me/16047197918
- Email: support@yarova.ca
- Location: Langley, British Columbia, Canada
